1.name: Stench
1.effect: Has a 10% chance of making target Pokémon [flinch]{mechanic:flinch} with each hit.

2.name: Drizzle
2.effect: Summons [rain]{mechanic:rain} that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

5.name: Sturdy
5.effect: Prevents being KOed from full [HP]{mechanic:hp}, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.

6.name: Damp
6.effect: Prevents []{move:self-destruct}, []{move:explosion}, and []{ability:aftermath} from working while the Pokémon is in battle.

8.name: Sand Veil
8.effect: Increases [evasion]{mechanic:evasion} to 1.25× during a [sandstorm]{mechanic:sandstorm}.  Protects against sandstorm damage.

9.name: Static
9.effect: Has a 30% chance of [paralyzing]{mechanic:paralysis} attacking Pokémon on contact.

13.name: Cloud Nine
13.effect: Negates all effects of [weather]{mechanic:weather}, but does not prevent the weather itself.

16.name: Color Change
16.effect: Changes type to match when hit by a damaging move.

18.name: Flash Fire
18.effect: Protects against []{type:fire} moves.  Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.

19.name: Shield Dust
19.effect: Protects against incoming moves' extra effects.

21.name: Suction Cups
21.effect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokémon's moves.

22.name: Intimidate
22.effect: Lowers opponents' [Attack]{mechanic:attack} one [stage]{mechanic:stat-modifier} upon entering battle.

23.name: Shadow Tag
23.effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.

24.name: Rough Skin
24.effect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max [HP]{mechanic:hp} on contact.

25.name: Wonder Guard
25.effect: Protects against damaging moves that are not [super effective]{mechanic:super-effective}.

27.name: Effect Spore
27.effect: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either [paralysis]{mechanic:paralysis}, [poison]{mechanic:poison}, or [sleep]{mechanic:sleep} on attacking Pokémon on contact.

28.name: Synchronize
28.effect: Copies [burns]{mechanic:burn}, [paralysis]{mechanic:paralysis}, and [poison]{mechanic:poison} received onto the Pokémon that inflicted them.

29.name: Clear Body
29.effect: Prevents stats from being [lowered]{mechanic:stat-modifier} by other Pokémon.

30.name: Natural Cure
30.effect: Cures any [major status ailment]{mechanic:major-status-ailment} upon switching out.

31.name: Lightning Rod
31.effect: Redirects single-target []{type:electric} moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising [Special Attack]{mechanic:special-attack} one [stage]{mechanic:stat-modifier}.

32.name: Serene Grace
32.effect: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.

36.name: Trace
36.effect: Copies an opponent's ability upon entering battle.

38.name: Poison Point
38.effect: Has a 30% chance of [poisoning]{mechanic:poison} attacking Pokémon on contact.

42.name: Magnet Pull
42.effect: Prevents []{type:steel} opponents from fleeing or switching out.

44.name: Rain Dish
44.effect: Heals for 1/16 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} after each turn during [rain]{mechanic:rain}.

45.name: Sand Stream
45.effect: Summons a [sandstorm]{mechanic:sandstorm} that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

46.name: Pressure
46.effect: Increases the [PP]{mechanic:pp} cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.

49.name: Flame Body
49.effect: Has a 30% chance of [burning]{mechanic:burn} attacking Pokémon on contact.

50.name: Run Away
50.effect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.

52.name: Hyper Cutter
52.effect: Prevents [Attack]{mechanic:attack} from being [lowered]{mechanic:stat-modifiers} by other Pokémon.

53.name: Pickup
53.effect: Picks up other Pokémon's used and [Flung]{move:fling} held items.  May also pick up an item after battle.

55.name: Hustle
55.effect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their [accuracy]{mechanic:accuracy} to 0.8×.

56.name: Cute Charm
56.effect: Has a 30% chance of [infatuating]{mechanic:infatuation} attacking Pokémon on contact.

57.name: Plus
57.effect: Increases [Special Attack]{mechanic:special-attack} to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has []{ability:plus} or []{ability:minus}.

58.name: Minus
58.effect: Increases [Special Attack]{mechanic:special-attack} to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has []{ability:plus} or []{ability:minus}.

59.name: Forecast
59.effect: Changes []{pokemon:castform}'s type and form to match the [weather]{mechanic:weather}.

60.name: Sticky Hold
60.effect: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.

61.name: Shed Skin
61.effect: Has a 33% chance of curing any [major status ailment]{mechanic:major-status-ailment} after each turn.

62.name: Guts
62.effect: Increases [Attack]{mechanic:attack} to 1.5× with a [major status ailment]{mechanic:major-status-ailment}.

63.name: Marvel Scale
63.effect: Increases [Defense]{mechanic:defense} to 1.5× with a [major status ailment]{mechanic:major-status-ailment}.

64.name: Liquid Ooze
64.effect: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.

65.name: Overgrow
65.effect: Strengthens []{type:grass} moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} or less.

66.name: Blaze
66.effect: Strengthens []{type:fire} moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} or less.

67.name: Torrent
67.effect: Strengthens []{type:water} moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} or less.

68.name: Swarm
68.effect: Strengthens []{type:bug} moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} or less.

70.name: Drought
70.effect: Summons [strong sunlight]{mechanic:strong-sunlight} that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

71.name: Arena Trap
71.effect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.  Eluded by []{type:flying}-types and Pokémon in the air.

73.name: White Smoke
73.effect: Prevents stats from being [lowered]{mechanic:stat-modifier} by other Pokémon.

76.name: Air Lock
76.effect: Negates all effects of [weather]{mechanic:weather}, but does not prevent the weather itself.

79.name: Rivalry
79.effect: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.

81.name: Snow Cloak
81.effect: Increases evasion to 1.25× during [hail]{mechanic:hail}.  Protects against hail damage.

82.name: Gluttony
82.effect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low [HP]{mechanic:hp} below 1/2 its max HP.

83.name: Anger Point
83.effect: Raises [Attack]{mechanic:attack} to the maximum of six [stages]{mechanic:stat-modifier} upon receiving a [critical hit]{mechanic:critical-hit}.

84.name: Unburden
84.effect: Doubles [Speed]{mechanic:speed} upon using or losing a held item.

86.name: Simple
86.effect: Doubles the Pokémon's [stat modifiers]{mechanic:stat-modifiers}.  These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.

87.name: Dry Skin
87.effect: Causes 1/8 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} in damage each turn during [strong sunlight]{mechanic:strong-sunlight}, but heals for 1/8 max HP during [rain]{mechanic:rain}.  Increases damage from []{type:fire} moves to 1.25×, but absorbs []{type:water} moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

88.name: Download
88.effect: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one [stage]{mechanic:stat-modifier} upon entering battle.

89.name: Iron Fist
89.effect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.

90.name: Poison Heal
90.effect: Heals for 1/8 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} after each turn when [poisoned]{mechanic:poison} in place of damage.

91.name: Adaptability
91.effect: Increases the [same-type attack bonus]{mechanic:same-type-attack-bonus} from 1.5× to 2×.

92.name: Skill Link
92.effect: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and []{move:triple-kick} to their full length every time.

93.name: Hydration
93.effect: Cures any [major status ailment]{mechanic:major-status-ailment} after each turn during [rain]{mechanic:rain}.

94.name: Solar Power
94.effect: Increases [Special Attack]{mechanic:special-attack} to 1.5× but costs 1/8 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} after each turn during [strong sunlight]{mechanic:strong-sunlight}.

95.name: Quick Feet
95.effect: Increases [Speed]{mechanic:speed} to 1.5× with a [major status ailment]{mechanic:major-status-ailment}.

96.name: Normalize
96.effect: Makes the Pokémon's moves all act []{type:normal}-type.

97.name: Sniper
97.effect: Strengthens [critical hits]{mechanic:critical-hit} to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.

98.name: Magic Guard
98.effect: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.

99.name: No Guard
99.effect: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.

100.name: Stall
100.effect: Makes the Pokémon move last within its move's priority bracket.

101.name: Technician
101.effect: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.

102.name: Leaf Guard
102.effect: Protects against [major status ailments]{mechanic:major-status-ailments} during [strong sunlight]{mechanic:strong-sunlight}.

103.name: Klutz
103.effect: Prevents the Pokémon from using its held item in battle.

104.name: Mold Breaker
104.effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.

105.name: Super Luck
105.effect: Raises moves' [critical hit]{mechanic:critical-hit} rates one stage.

106.name: Aftermath
106.effect: Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max [HP]{mechanic:hp} when knocked out by a contact move.

107.name: Anticipation
107.effect: Notifies all trainers upon entering battle if an opponent has a [super-effective]{mechanic:super-effective} move, []{move:self-destruct}, []{move:explosion}, or a one-hit KO move.

108.name: Forewarn
108.effect: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.

109.name: Unaware
109.effect: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.

111.name: Filter
111.effect: Decreases damage taken from [super-effective]{mechanic:super-effective} moves by 1/4.

112.name: Slow Start
112.effect: Halves [Attack]{mechanic:attack} and [Speed]{mechanic:speed} for five turns upon entering battle.

113.name: Scrappy
113.effect: Lets the Pokémon's []{type:normal} and []{type:fighting} moves hit []{type:ghost} Pokémon.

114.name: Storm Drain
114.effect: Redirects single-target []{type:water} moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Water moves, raising [Special Attack]{mechanic:special-attack} one [stage]{mechanic:stat-modifier}.

115.name: Ice Body
115.effect: Heals for 1/16 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.

116.name: Solid Rock
116.effect: Decreases damage taken from [super-effective]{mechanic:super-effective} moves by 1/4.

117.name: Snow Warning
117.effect: Summons [hail]{mechanic:hail} that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

118.name: Honey Gather
118.effect: The Pokémon may pick up []{item:honey} after battle.

119.name: Frisk
119.effect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.

120.name: Reckless
120.effect: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.

121.name: Multitype
121.effect: Changes []{pokemon:arceus}'s type and form to match its held Plate.

122.name: Flower Gift
122.effect: Increases friendly Pokémon's [Attack]{mechanic:attack} and [Special Defense]{mechanic:special-defense} to 1.5× during [strong sunlight]{mechanic:strong-sunlight}.

123.name: Bad Dreams
123.effect: Damages [sleeping]{mechanic:sleep} opponents for 1/8 their max [HP]{mechanic:hp} after each turn.

124.name: Pickpocket
124.effect: Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.

125.name: Sheer Force
125.effect: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3× their power, but prevents their extra effects.

127.name: Unnerve
127.effect: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.

128.name: Defiant
128.effect: Raises [Attack]{mechanic:attack} two [stages]{mechanic:stat-modifier} upon having any stat lowered.

129.name: Defeatist
129.effect: Halves [Attack]{mechanic:attack} and [Special Attack]{mechanic:special-attack} at 50% max [HP]{mechanic:hp} or less.

130.name: Cursed Body
130.effect: Has a 30% chance of [Disabling]{move:disable} any move that hits the Pokémon.

131.name: Healer
131.effect: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any [major status ailment]{mechanic:major-status-ailment} after each turn.

132.name: Friend Guard
132.effect: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.

133.name: Weak Armor
133.effect: Raises [Speed]{mechanic:speed} and lowers [Defense]{mechanic:defense} by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.

139.name: Harvest
139.effect: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokémon has held no items in the meantime.

140.name: Telepathy
140.effect: Protects against friendly Pokémon's damaging moves.

141.name: Moody
141.effect: Raises a random stat two [stages]{mechanic:stat-modifier} and lowers another one stage after each turn.

143.name: Poison Touch
143.effect: Has a 30% chance of [poisoning]{mechanic:poison} target Pokémon upon contact.

144.name: Regenerator
144.effect: Heals for 1/3 max [HP]{mechanic:hp} upon switching out.

146.name: Sand Rush
146.effect: Doubles [Speed]{mechanic:speed} during a [sandstorm]{mechanic:sandstorm}.  Protects against sandstorm damage.

147.name: Wonder Skin
147.effect: Lowers incoming non-damaging moves' base [accuracy]{mechanic:accuracy} to exactly 50%.

148.name: Analytic
148.effect: Strengthens moves to 1.3× their power when moving last.

149.name: Illusion
149.effect: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokémon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.

152.name: Mummy
152.effect: Changes attacking Pokémon's abilities to Mummy on contact.

153.name: Moxie
153.effect: Raises [Attack]{mechanic:attack} one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.

154.name: Justified
154.effect: Raises [Attack]{mechanic:attack} one stage upon taking damage from a []{type:dark} move.

155.name: Rattled
155.effect: Raises [Speed]{mechanic:speed} one [stage]{mechanic:stat-modifier} upon being hit by a []{type:dark}, []{type:ghost}, or []{type:bug} move.

156.name: Magic Bounce
156.effect: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.

158.name: Prankster
158.effect: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.

159.name: Sand Force
159.effect: Strengthens []{type:rock}, []{type:ground}, and []{type:steel} moves to 1.3× their power during a [sandstorm]{mechanic:sandstorm}.  Protects against sandstorm damage.

160.name: Iron Barbs
160.effect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max [HP]{mechanic:hp} on contact.

161.name: Zen Mode
161.effect: Changes []{pokemon:darmanitan}'s form after each turn depending on its [HP]{mechanic:hp}: Zen Mode below 50% max HP, and Standard Mode otherwise.

162.name: Victory Star
162.effect: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.1× for friendly Pokémon.

163.name: Turboblaze
163.effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.

164.name: Teravolt
164.effect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.

165.name: Aroma Veil
165.effect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.

166.name: Flower Veil
166.effect: Protects friendly []{type:grass} Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.

167.name: Cheek Pouch
167.effect: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.

168.name: Protean
168.effect: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.

170.name: Magician
170.effect: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.

171.name: Bulletproof
171.effect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.

172.name: Competitive
172.effect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

173.name: Strong Jaw
173.effect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.

174.name: Refrigerate
174.effect: Turns the bearer's []{type:normal} moves into []{type:ice} moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.

176.name: Stance Change
176.effect: Changes []{pokemon:aegislash} to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using []{move:kings-shield}.

177.name: Gale Wings
177.effect: Raises []{type:flying} moves' priority by one stage.

178.name: Mega Launcher
178.effect: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.

179.name: Grass Pelt
179.effect: Boosts Defense while []{move:grassy-terrain} is in effect.

180.name: Symbiosis
180.effect: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.

181.name: Tough Claws
181.effect: Strengthens moves that make contact to 1.33× their power.

182.name: Pixilate
182.effect: Turns the bearer's []{type:normal} moves into []{type:fairy} moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.

183.name: Gooey
183.effect: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.

184.name: Aerilate
184.effect: Turns the bearer's []{type:normal} moves into []{type:flying} moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.

185.name: Parental Bond
185.effect: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves.  The second hit has half power.

186.name: Dark Aura
186.effect: Strengthens []{type:dark} moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.

187.name: Fairy Aura
187.effect: Strengthens []{type:fairy} moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.

188.name: Aura Break
188.effect: Makes []{ability:dark-aura} and []{ability:fairy-aura} weaken moves of their respective types.

189.effect: Creates heavy rain, which has all the properties of Rain Dance, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Fire moves to fail.

190.name: Desolate Land
190.effect: Creates extremely harsh sunlight, which has all the properties of Sunny Day, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Water moves to fail.

191.name: Delta Stream
191.effect: Creates a mysterious air current, which cannot be replaced and causes moves to never be super effective against Flying Pokémon.

192.name: Stamina
192.effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.

193.name: Wimp Out
193.effect: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.

194.name: Emergency Exit
194.effect: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.

195.name: Water Compaction
195.effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by two stages when it's hit by a Water move.

196.name: Merciless
196.effect: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.

197.name: Shields Down
197.effect: Transforms this Minior between Core Form and Meteor Form.  Prevents major status ailments and drowsiness while in Meteor Form.

198.name: Stakeout
198.effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.

199.name: Water Bubble
199.effect: Halves damage from Fire moves, doubles damage of Water moves, and prevents burns.

200.name: Steelworker
200.effect: This Pokémon's Steel moves have 1.5× power.

201.name: Berserk
201.effect: Raises this Pokémon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.

202.name: Slush Rush
202.effect: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.

203.name: Long Reach
203.effect: This Pokémon's moves do not make contact.

205.name: Triage
205.effect: This Pokémon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.

206.name: Galvanize
206.effect: This Pokémon's Normal moves are Electric and have their power increased to 1.2×.

207.name: Surge Surfer
207.effect: Doubles this Pokémon's Speed on Electric Terrain.

208.name: Schooling
208.effect: Wishiwashi becomes Schooling Form when its HP is 25% or higher.

209.name: Disguise
209.effect: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.

210.name: Battle Bond
210.effect: Transforms this Pokémon into Ash-Greninja after fainting an opponent.  Water Shuriken's power is 20 and always hits three times.

211.name: Power Construct
211.effect: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.

212.name: Corrosion
212.effect: This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.

213.name: Comatose
213.effect: This Pokémon always  acts as though it were Asleep.

214.name: Queenly Majesty
214.effect: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.

215.name: Innards Out
215.effect: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.

216.name: Dancer
216.effect: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.

217.name: Battery
217.effect: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.

218.name: Fluffy
218.effect: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.

219.name: Dazzling
219.effect: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.

220.name: Soul-Heart
220.effect: This Pokémon's Special Attack rises by one stage every time any Pokémon faints.

221.name: Tangling Hair
221.effect: When this Pokémon takes regular damage from a contact move, the attacking Pokémon's Speed lowers by one stage.

222.name: Receiver
222.effect: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.

223.name: Power of Alchemy
223.effect: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.

224.name: Beast Boost
224.effect: Raises this Pokémon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokémon.

225.name: RKS System
225.effect: Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.

226.name: Electric Surge
226.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Electric Terrain.

227.name: Psychic Surge
227.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.

228.name: Misty Surge
228.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.

229.name: Grassy Surge
229.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Grassy Terrain.

230.name: Full Metal Body
230.effect: Other Pokémon cannot lower this Pokémon's stats.

231.name: Shadow Shield
231.effect: When this Pokémon has full HP, regular damage from moves is halved.

236.name: Libero
236.effect: Libero changes the Pokémon's type to that of its previously used attack.

237.name: Ball Fetch
237.effect: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

238.name: Cotton Down
238.effect: When Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

239.name: Propeller Tail
239.effect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

241.name: Gulp Missile
241.effect: If a Cramorant with Gulp Missile uses Surf or Dive, it catches prey and changes its form depending on its remaining HP.

242.name: Stalwart
242.effect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

243.name: Steam Engine
243.effect: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

244.name: Punk Rock
244.effect: Boosts sound-based moves and halves damage from the same moves.

245.name: Sand Spit
245.effect: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.

248.effect: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.

249.name: Power Spot
249.effect: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.

250.name: Mimicry
250.effect: Changes type depending on the terrain.

251.name: Screen Cleaner
251.effect: Nullifies effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.

252.name: Steely Spirit
252.effect: Powers up ally Pokémon's Steel-type moves.

254.name: Wandering Spirit
254.effect: Swaps abilities with opponents on contact.

255.effect: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

257.name: Pastel Veil
257.effect: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.

258.effect: Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode

260.name: Unseen Fist
260.effect: Contact moves can strike through Protect/Detect.

261.effect: Resets all stat changes upon entering battlefield.

264.effect: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.

265.name: Grim Neigh
265.effect: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.

268.name: Lingering Aroma

270.name: Thermal Exchange

273.effect: Immune to Fire-type moves, and Defense is sharply boosted.

285.effect: Lowers Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

286.effect: Lowers Attack of all Pokémon except itself.

287.name: Beads of Ruin
287.effect: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

288.name: Orichalcum Pulse
288.effect: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.

289.name: Hadron Engine
289.effect: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.

290.name: Opportunist
290.effect: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.

291.name: Cud Chew
291.effect: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.

293.name: Supreme Overlord
293.effect: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.

294.name: Costar
294.effect: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.

295.name: Toxic Debris
295.effect: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

296.name: Armor Tail
296.effect: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.

297.name: Earth Eater
297.effect: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.

298.name: Mycelium Might
298.effect: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.

299.name: Mind’s Eye
299.effect: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

300.name: Supersweet Syrup
300.effect: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.

301.name: Hospitality
301.effect: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.

302.name: Toxic Chain
302.effect: May cause bad poisoning when the Pokémon hits an opponent with a move.

303.name: Embody Aspect
303.effect: Embody Aspect boosts a particular stat, depending on the form of a Terastallized Ogerpon

304.name: Tera Shift
304.effect: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.

305.name: Tera Shell
305.effect: All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

306.name: Teraform Zero
306.effect: As soon as Terapagos assumes its Stellar Form, it will immediately neutralize weather and terrain effects.

307.name: Poison Puppeteer
307.effect: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
